001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.buttons;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.menu.Menu;
004import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.util.TranslationUtil;
005import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.internal.lang.Displays;
006import org.bukkit.Material;
007import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
008import org.bukkit.inventory.meta.ItemMeta;
009import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
010import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
011
012public class BackButton extends MenuButton {
013
014    private final int slot;
015
016    public BackButton(@NotNull Menu menu, int slot) {
017        super(() -> menu);
018        this.slot = slot;
019    }
020
021    @Override
022    public @NotNull Material getIconMaterial() {
023        return Material.OAK_DOOR;
024    }
025
026    @Override
027    public int getIconAmount() {
028        return 1;
029    }
030
031    @Override
032    public @Nullable ItemMeta applyIconMeta(@NotNull Player viewer, @NotNull ItemMeta target) {
033        target.displayName(TranslationUtil.render(Displays.BACK_BUTTON, viewer));
034        return target;
035    }
036
037    @Override
038    public int getSlot() {
039        return slot;
040    }
041}
